stem: The scatterplot shows the relationship between two variables, x and y. Which of the following graphs shows the most appropriate model for the data?
explanation: The points rise slowly at first and then shoot up, an increasing curved (exponential-like) trend, and a good model should have points scattered both above and below it. Only choice D is an increasing curve that runs through the middle of the data; A and B are straight lines and C sits above every point.
